_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: There was a strong correlation between NFTI-QOL-D and PHQ-9 (Pearson's rho = 0.63, 95% CI 0.48–0.75).
details: Strong correlation with PHQ-9 depression scores (Pearson's rho = 0.63, 95% CI 0.48–0.75)
